name: TIC Solutions, Inc.
business: TIC Solutions, Inc. provides tech-enabled Testing, Inspection, Certification and Compliance (TICC), engineering, and geospatial services that are essential to the safety, reliability, and efficiency of industrial assets, buildings, and public infrastructure. The company operates primarily in North America and serves private-sector clients across industrial, infrastructure, construction, and commercial real estate end markets, as well as public-sector clients including federal, state, and municipal agencies, public utilities, transportation authorities, and environmental regulators.
sellsTo: private-sector industrial, infrastructure, construction, and commercial real estate
public-sector federal, state, and municipal agencies, public utilities, transportation authorities, and environmental regulators

exposures.sentence: Our public-sector clients include federal, state, and municipal agencies, public utilities, transportation authorities, and environmental regulators.

Within industrial markets, our services address energy processing and refining, pipeline and midstream infrastructure, chemicals and industrial processing, manufacturing and industrial services, power generation and utilities, and companies in aerospace, automotive, renewable energy, pulp and paper, and mining.
These offerings support long-term monitoring and decision-making for utilities, transportation systems, defense and intelligence agencies, and environmental authorities.

Consulting Engineering revenue was $300.1 million for the year ended December 31, 2025 (Successor) due to the NV5 Acquisition and was primarily attributable to growth in data center and infrastructure conformity assessment work as well as real estate due diligence projects.

Within industrial markets, our services address energy processing and refining, pipeline and midstream infrastructure, chemicals and industrial processing, manufacturing and industrial services, power generation and utilities, and companies in aerospace, automotive, renewable energy, pulp and paper, and mining.

Our Consulting Engineering services include engineering design, conformity assessment, infrastructure engineering, building and technology design, environmental consulting, and materials engineering and testing.
